sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99555" key="sunastre/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συναστρ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n99555.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be born under the same star</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:1:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Callisth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
